topic: three-part ratios and part-to-whole ratios with fractions
latex:
A certain mix of paint calls for $5$ gallons of blue paint, $2$ gallons of yellow paint, and $3$ gallons of black paint. Write a three-part ratio representing the mix. Then write a part-to-whole ratio of black paint to the total mixed paint. Finally, write a fraction in simplest form to express the proportion of black paint to the whole.

black paint : blue paint : yellow paint $=$ \_\_\_\_ : \_\_\_\_ : \_\_\_\_

black paint : mixed paint $=$ \_\_\_\_ : \_\_\_\_

Proportion of black paint (out of whole) $=$ \_\_\_\_
